bracu_official.title: BRAC University celebrates International Day of Yoga
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University commemorated the International Day of Yoga with a special celebration on June 24, 2026.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University organizes session on "Classroom to Career: Goal Setting for a Successful Academic & Professional Life"
bracu_official.summary: On June 22, 2026, BRAC University hosted a session guiding students on transitioning from academic learning to professional success through goal setting.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University conducts synergy in action workshop to strengthen workplace effectiveness
bracu_official.summary: A workshop focused on strengthening workplace effectiveness through synergy in action was conducted by BRAC University on June 22, 2026.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the award B-113 under the ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2 scheme was announced on June 25, 2026.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the award B-113 under the ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1 scheme was announced on June 25, 2026.

bracu_official.title: Ashura (Muharram)*-University closed
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will be closed on June 26, 2026, in observance of Ashura (Muharram).

bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final deadline for payment for the Summer 2026 semester is June 27, 2026.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: A recruitment notice, detailing new opportunities at BRAC University, was released on June 16, 2026.

bracu_official.title: LLB Final Exam Schedule: Spring 2026
bracu_official.summary: The final examination schedule for LLB programs for the Spring 2026 semester was published on June 15, 2026.

bracu_official.title: Mid-Term Exams week
bracu_official.summary: An announcement outlining the schedule for the upcoming mid-term examinations week, starting July 25, 2026.

bracu_official.title: Final Examinations
bracu_official.summary: An important notice regarding the upcoming final examinations scheduled for December 10, 2026.
